allow: Bash(cmd //c "curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""%{http_code}"" http://localhost:3000/icon.svg && echo """" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""%{http_code}"" http://localhost:3000/icon-192.png && echo """" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""%{http_code}"" http://localhost:3000/favicon.ico")

Bash(cmd //c "curl -s -o nul -w ""icon.svg: %{http_code}\\n"" http://localhost:3000/icon.svg && curl -s -o nul -w ""icon-192.png: %{http_code}\\n"" http://localhost:3000/icon-192.png && curl -s -o nul -w ""favicon.ico: %{http_code}\\n"" http://localhost:3000/favicon.ico && curl -s -o nul -w ""favicon-32x32.png: %{http_code}\\n"" http://localhost:3000/favicon-32x32.png && curl -s -o nul -w ""apple-touch-icon.png: %{http_code}\\n"" http://localhost:3000/apple-touch-icon.png")
